ideas.title: Topology-aware continuity retrieval
ideas.summary: Use topology-aware continuity retrieval over the current ecosystem instead of relying only on flat keyword, recency, or embedding recall.
ideas.nextAction: Build a 30-query benchmark against keyword, recency, and embedding baselines.

ideas.title: Chronophore
ideas.summary: Replacement term for the non-physical Sophon-like witness-form in the Merge Protocol essay: a carrier of observational coherence through temporal merge geometry, not an unfolded/reassembled physical proton.
ideas.nextAction: Use Chronophore as the formal term when revising the Merge Protocol essay; reserve Aletheion for a future truth/unconcealment concept.
notes: Aletheion remains a strong future candidate, likely for a related truth-field or unconcealment-system concept rather than the immediate object.
